must_have_quals: 4+ years of professional experience designing, building, and maintaining web applications, Willingness to work a hybrid onsite schedule in our San Francisco office, Experience developing server-side using an object-oriented approach, building API's, and working with a modern frontend framework, Experience using transactional databases, Ability to move quickly in a startup environment, Impeccable attention to detail
core_responsibilities: Improve, extend, and tie together existing backend services to support our internal facing applications, Rapidly prototype new tools and features that will make an immediate impact on the business, Contribute to a highly collaborative, feedback-driven, fast-paced engineering team, Develop broad ownership over our internal applications including setting coding patterns, best practices, and guidelines, Collaborate closely with our product team to plan and execute projects at rapid speed
job_summary: Windfall is a people intelligence and AI company that gives go-to-market teams actionable insights. As a Full Stack Software Engineer, you will connect services, create APIs, and build UIs across multiple products in a collaborative environment, while contributing to innovative, AI-driven features for customer-facing applications and internal tooling.
